y; desktop is operator console, VM runs relay.
- `docs/SOP/PPE_CANONICAL_OPERATOR_SCRIPTS_V1.md`: canonical verdict-to-command mapping.
- `docs/SOP/REPO_LAYER_MAP_V1.md`: repo layer boundary; `apps/msos-web/` is MSOS shell, `src/viz/` is PPE UI, `src/engine|data|models/` are PPE core.
- `docs/SOP/MSOS_P1_STACK_ROUTING_ADR.md`: accepted stack/routing ADR; MSOS Next shell must not port PPE math.
- `docs/DEPLOY/MSOS_WEB_V1.md`: runtime routing for `msos_web`, `/ppe-embed`, and `/ppe-display-api`.
- `docs/SOP/PPE_TRADEABLE_UNIVERSE_ADR.md`: display/catalog boundary; MSOS reads PPE-owned `catalog.json` and `display.json`.

Key boundary confirmation: MSOS is display/shell only; PPE owns fetch, normalization, and implied-distribution math.

Primary MSOS shell / PPE boundary files:

- `.cursor/rules/ppe-desktop-vm-layout.mdc`: hard machine boundary; desktop is operator console, VM runs relay.

- `docs/SOP/REPO_LAYER_MAP_V1.md`: repo layer boundary; `apps/msos-web/` is MSOS shell, `src/viz/` is PPE UI, `src/engine|data|models/` are PPE core.
- `docs/SOP/MSOS_P1_STACK_ROUTING_ADR.md`: accepted stack/routing ADR; MSOS Next shell must not port PPE math.

- `docs/SOP/PPE_TRADEABLE_UNIVERSE_ADR.md`: display/catalog boundary; MSOS reads PPE-owned `catalog.json` and `display.json`.

Key boundary confirmation: MSOS is display/shell only; PPE owns fetch, normalization, and implied-distribution math.
